Lobby.title: Lobby
Lobby.description: An online game lobby containing matchmaking parameters, state, and participant profiles.

hostName.description: The custom username of the lobby master.

hostId.description: A unique client-side generated identifier for the host.

guestName.description: The custom username of the secondary player.

guestId.description: A unique client-side generated identifier for the guest.

status.description: Matching status, e.g. waiting, playing, or closed.

settings.description: Complex map of custom round attributes like score limits or active levels.

p1.description: Host player real-time state sync payload.

p2.description: Guest player real-time state sync payload.

/lobbies/{lobbyId}.description: Collection of matchable game lobbies available or running.
